variants: Orsolya Miseta is a network engineering expert who resides at Hemlock Court. She has authored the influential book, the Jasper Filament Guide, which showcases her deep knowledge in the field. For her exceptional contributions, Orsolya has been awarded the prestigious Dawnspire Token. Beyond her professional achievements, she is also an engaged member of the Barleyquill Stenographers Circle, where she collaborates with peers who share her interests and expertise in stenography.
